name: Lime Chicken Shish Kabob^
recipeIngredient: 1 Red bell pepper, cut into 1-inch cubes
1 Green bell pepper, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine lime juice, garlic, soy sauce, and apple juice concentrate.
2. Add chicken breasts to the marinade and stir to coat evenly. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours, turning occasionally.
3. Preheat grill or broiler.
4. Alternate chicken cubes and vegetables (mushrooms, red bell pepper, onions, green bell pepper, zucchini) on skewers.
5. Grill or broil the skewers for about 10 minutes, turning and basting with marinade as needed.
Per serving: Calories: 132 Protein: 17g Carbohydrates: 17g Fat: 1g Sodium: 192mg Cholesterol: 30mg
